list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.activity FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m ORDER BY 1;

list.name: vo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.vo FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.site FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.vo) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.site_id) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.cfp_g,0)))::numeric, 3) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.bucket_15m, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(m.energy_wh,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.bucket_15m, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(m.cfp_g,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT m.activity AS site_type, SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)) AS records FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY records DESC;

SELECT m.vo AS vo, COUNT(DISTINCT m.site_id) AS sites, COUNT(DISTINCT m.activity) AS site_types, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS energy_wh, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.cfp_g,0)))::numeric,3) AS cfp_g, SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)) AS records FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY energy_wh DESC;
